goal: Create add.py module with an add(a, b) function that returns the sum of its arguments, plus pytest tests to verify its functionality.
scope: Create add.py with add(a, b) function returning a+b
Create pytest test file (test_add.py) with tests for the add function
out_of_scope: Type hints or static type checking
Edge case handling beyond basic addition

acceptance_criteria.check: python3 -c "from add import add; assert callable(add)"
acceptance_criteria.expected: add function is importable and callable

acceptance_criteria.check: python3 -c "from add import add; assert add(2, 3) == 5"
